next_action: Design approved. Proceed to phase-1-governance-docs implementation, preserving the exact I1/I2/B1/R1/R2/R3 approval sentences and the documented phase scope.

observations.detail: Non-blocking doc hygiene: 01-design.md still says the canonical decision is 00-requirement's “핵심 정책 5개”, while 00 now defines six control points plus interpretation rules. The operative tables and plan are coherent, but that stale phrase can be cleaned during implementation/docs polishing.
